Our Story

Every gift deserves to feel special

At Velmori Gifts, we believe that the best gifts aren't just bought — they're curated, crafted, and wrapped with genuine care. Every hamper, bouquet, and mini gift box we create is made with thought and love.

Whether it's a birthday, anniversary, apology, or just because — we have the perfect gift waiting for your someone special.

How It Works

Ordering is simple & easy

💬
1

WhatsApp Us

Message Ruchita on WhatsApp and tell us who the gift is for and what you're looking for.

🎨
2

We Curate

We put together the perfect combination of items tailored to your budget and occasion.

🎀
3

We Wrap

Your gift is packaged beautifully with tissue, ribbons, and a personal message tag.

🚚
4

Delivered

Receive your gift ready to give — or we can arrange delivery directly to your loved one.
